resources.string: Page load failed. Check the configuration or network connection.
Check your connection and try again.
The server took too long to respond. Try again in a moment.
The requested page could not be found.
The site certificate could not be verified. Check the network or certificate settings.
The page could not be opened. Try again later.
The icon file is stored in the project directory and exported with the project package. Pack will replace the template APK launcher icons with this file.
The splash image is stored with the project and injected into the packed APK as a fixed asset. Preview launch and packed launch both read the same image.
Common icon names: home, docs, profile, menu, location, camera, upload, download, settings, info, search, favorite, news, chat.

Leave blank to open the first navigation item. When set, matching shells will open the item with this ID first. Enable swipe navigation lets left and right flings switch between adjacent navigation items. Reset on navigation clears the current page history when switching navigation items, and back will return to the home item first.
The %1$s shell does not render native navigation items.
The %1$s shell does not expose top-bar or bottom-bar parameters in this version.
Single-page WebView shell without native top or bottom bars.
Single-page shell that keeps both status and navigation bars hidden by default.
Toolbar shell with a left drawer menu backed by configured navigation items.
Combined shell with a native top bar and bottom tab navigation.
Toolbar shell with page title, back action, and refresh.
Tab-style shell backed by configured navigation items.
Host rules support exact hosts, wildcard subdomains like *.example.com, and optional scheme prefixes such as https://example.com.
Action icon names: back, close, home, search, refresh, settings, menu.
Set 0 for square corners. This value affects both preview and runtime drawer shape.
Wallpaper and avatar are stored in the project and reused by preview, runtime shell, export, and pack.
Selected color controls the active icon and label. Background color controls the bar surface.
These values are written into the packed Android app and determine the final app identity users see after installation.
Leave blank to auto-generate a package name during Pack.
Use lowercase letters and digits, separated by dots, such as com.example.app.
Customize the APK output file name template used during export and pack.
Supports placeholders: {projectName}, {appName}, {versionName}, {versionCode}, {packageName}. Leave blank to use the default naming rule.
Pack can use the default AndroidKeyStore signer, or a custom keystore that you import for this project.
Leave key password blank to reuse the store password.
Tap Pick to choose a color, or type a hex value manually.
Tap Pick to choose from the built-in icon catalog, or type an icon ID manually.
Visual editing now covers common rule fields. Advanced colors and uncommon overrides can still use the JSON tab.
Events listen for page lifecycle or SPA route changes, then run one or more native or JS actions.
Targets can be your Default URL, any Navigation item URL, or any later in-page route that matches the rule.
Match is optional. Leave all three blank to listen on every page for the selected trigger.
A rule matches when any non-empty condition below matches the current page URL.
This action type has no extra fields.
Preview reacts to current shell colors, navigation labels, drawer header text, and common visibility switches. It is an approximate mockup, not a live render.
Web content with native shell around it
This will remove the project files from local storage. This action cannot be undone.
Turn websites into polished Android apps with a configurable native shell.
Disclaimer: This app is a local web-to-app packaging tool. Make sure you are authorized to use the target website content and branding assets.
Download link is not configured yet.
Create a new project from scratch, or import an existing .fireflyproj.zip or app-config.json package.
If the system language is not supported, the app falls back to English.
Before using Firefly, please read and accept the following terms:
1. This app is a local web-to-app packaging tool. You must ensure you are authorized to use any website content, brand assets, accounts, and data involved in your projects.
2. You are solely responsible for project configuration, packaged outputs, distribution behavior, and compliance with applicable laws, platform policies, and third-party terms.
3. Update checks and notice requests will only run after you agree to this dialog.
If you do not agree, the app will exit immediately.
Browse built-in icons and tap one to copy its icon ID.
Try another keyword or switch the category filter.
Enable app installs for FireflyAPP, then tap Install again.
App install permission is not available.
Unpack a template APK, inject the current project config, and prepare a local repack workspace.
Inspect the final package identity, signer, and whether the APK can replace an installed app.

This Pack page now follows the template APK repack route. Pack will repack the template APK, patch a project-specific package identity, sign with the default AndroidKeyStore key or your imported custom keystore, and expose an Install action.
Recent successful APK outputs for this project.
Delete this pack history entry and its APK file?\n\n%1$s
Verify the signed APK structure before install and share actions are exposed.
ApkVerifier accepted the signed APK with warnings. See pack.log for details.
PackageManager accepted the signed APK archive.
PackageManager rejected the signed APK archive on this device. Review pack.log before installing.
Unable to inspect Pack preflight checks.
Failed to inspect template APK workspace.
Unable to refresh Pack preflight checks.
Template APK workspace is ready for repack.
Failed to prepare template APK workspace.
Template APK repack and signing are running...
Unable to delete the selected pack history entry.
Signed APK generated and ready to install.
Signed APK generated and passed artifact self-check.
Signed APK generated with artifact self-check warnings. Review the pack log before installing.
Unsigned APK is missing. Run Pack first.
Unpacked template APK directory is missing.
Allow %1$s to use your camera and microphone?
Allow %1$s to open the file picker and choose files from your device?
